payload.long_description: Close-up view of a partial oven front with a horizontal brushed stainless-steel handle above a dark brown glossy door panel showing vertical reflections and a bright highlight; image is edge-cropped and includes a countertop corner in the foreground — approximately 0.6 m from the camera.
